name: NEONATAL INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE
definition: GERMINAL MATRIX-RELATED HEMORRHAGE periventricular venous infarction ← thrombosis of medullary veins WHITE MATTER INJURY OF PREMATURITY PVL = perinatal hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy PRINCIPAL ischemic lesion of the premature infant characterized by areas of focal coagulation CYSTIC PERIVENTRICULAR LEUKOMALACIA leukoencephalopathy resulting from pre- / perinatal hypoxic-ischemic event more extensive brain damage than PVL; may include all of white matter in subcortex +

demographics.Location: on side of largest amount of IVH, commonly lateral to frontal horns / in
demographics.Histo: edema, white matter necrosis, evolution of cysts + cavities / diminished myelin;
demographics.Associated with: the most severe cases of intraventricular hemorrhage
